tasks.subject: Task 1: Rebrand packages from @hyperdx/* to @berg/*
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 1)

**Goal:** Every package, import, branding string, and configuration says "berg" instead of "hyperdx". Build still passes.

**Verify:** `grep -r "@hyperdx" packages --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.json" | grep -v node_modules | grep -v hyperdx.io` returns nothing

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","packages/api/package.json","packages/app/package.json","packages/common-utils/package.json","packages/api/src","packages/app/src","packages/app/pages","Makefile","docker-compose.dev.yml","docker-compose.yml","README.md","AGENTS.md","CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"make ci-lint && make ci-unit","acceptanceCriteria":["No @hyperdx/ imports anywhere","App branding says Berg","@berg/ in all package names","Lint and unit tests pass","packages/cli deleted"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-1-rebrand-packages-from-hyperdx-to-berg"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Strip observability-specific UI and code
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 2)

**Goal:** Delete every observability-specific page, component, model, router, controller, and the entire `packages/otel-collector`. Codebase becomes a Berg-shell.

**Verify:** `grep -rn "from '@/SessionsPage'\|from '@/AlertsPage'\|from '@/ServicesDashboardPage'" packages/app/src` returns nothing

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/app/pages/sessions.tsx","packages/app/pages/services.tsx","packages/app/pages/service-map.tsx","packages/app/pages/kubernetes.tsx","packages/app/pages/alerts.tsx","packages/app/pages/benchmark.tsx","packages/app/pages/careers.tsx","packages/app/src/SessionsPage.tsx","packages/app/src/ServicesDashboardPage.tsx","packages/app/src/KubernetesDashboardPage.tsx","packages/app/src/AlertsPage.tsx","packages/app/src/components/LogSidePanelElements.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBTracePanel.tsx","packages/api/src/models/alert.ts","packages/api/src/models/webhook.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/alerts.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/webhooks.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/clickhouseProxy.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/index.ts","packages/api/src/api-app.ts","packages/api/src/mcp","packages/api/src/opamp","packages/otel-collector","packages/app/src/components/AppNav/AppNav.tsx","package.json"],"verifyCommand":"make ci-lint && make ci-unit","acceptanceCriteria":["All observability files deleted","Routers cleaned","AppNav cleaned","Lint and unit tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-2-strip-observability-specific-ui-and-code"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Delete Connection model; Athena config from env; collapse Source kinds
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 3)

**Goal:** Connection deleted; Athena config from env; Source single Table kind; User.role added (default 'admin'). Migrations included.

**Verify:** `cd packages/api && yarn ci:unit src/models/__tests__/source.test.ts && make ci-lint`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/config.ts","packages/api/src/models/source.ts","packages/api/src/models/user.ts","packages/common-utils/src/types.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/index.ts","packages/api/src/api-app.ts","packages/api/src/setupDefaults.ts","packages/api/src/controllers/sources.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/sources.ts","packages/app/src/source.ts","packages/api/migrations/202605040001-collapse-source-kinds.js","packages/api/migrations/202605040002-add-user-role.js",".env.example"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/api && yarn ci:unit src/models/__tests__/source.test.ts && make ci-lint","acceptanceCriteria":["Connection deleted","Source single Table kind","User.role added","Athena env enforced","Migrations written"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-3-delete-connection-model-athena-config-from-env-collapse-source-kinds"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Implement Athena query client in common-utils
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 4)

**Goal:** New `@berg/common-utils/athena` module replaces `clickhouse/`. Sync/async query lifecycle on `@aws-sdk/client-athena` using IRSA; type mapping; cancel; pagination; result-reuse caching.

**Verify:** `cd packages/common-utils && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/athena.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/common-utils/src/athena/index.ts","packages/common-utils/src/athena/types.ts","packages/common-utils/src/athena/typeMapping.ts","packages/common-utils/src/__tests__/athena.test.ts","packages/common-utils/src/clickhouse","packages/common-utils/src/__tests__/clickhouse.test.ts","packages/common-utils/package.json","packages/common-utils/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/common-utils && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/athena.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["All AthenaClient methods","Type mapping","Errors classified","Result reuse enabled","Tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-4-implement-athena-query-client-in-common-utils"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Port Lucene parser to emit Trino SQL
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 5)

**Goal:** New `TrinoSchemaSerializer` subclass of `SQLSerializer` emits Trino SQL. `CustomSchemaSQLSerializerV2` and ClickHouse helpers deleted. All parser tests assert Trino output.

**Verify:** `cd packages/common-utils && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/queryParser.test.ts src/__tests__/renderChartConfig.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/common-utils/src/queryParser.ts","packages/common-utils/src/sqlFormatter.ts","packages/common-utils/src/__tests__/queryParser.test.ts","packages/common-utils/src/__tests__/renderChartConfig.test.ts","packages/common-utils/src/core/renderChartConfig.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/common-utils && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/queryParser.test.ts src/__tests__/renderChartConfig.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["TrinoSchemaSerializer exists","All tests pass","CustomSchemaSQLSerializerV2 deleted","Optional time-window","Unknown columns rejected"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-5-port-lucene-parser-to-emit-trino-sql"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Implement Glue catalog discovery
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 6)

**Goal:** New `@berg/common-utils/glue` module wraps `@aws-sdk/client-glue` for catalog discovery. AccessDenied silently filters browse paths; explicit on direct fetch.

**Verify:** `cd packages/common-utils && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/glue.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/common-utils/src/glue/index.ts","packages/common-utils/src/glue/types.ts","packages/common-utils/src/__tests__/glue.test.ts","packages/common-utils/package.json"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/common-utils && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/glue.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["All four methods","Pagination","Format detection","AccessDenied filtering","Tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-6-implement-glue-catalog-discovery"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Implement query lifecycle API endpoints
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 7)

**Goal:** REST endpoints for query lifecycle and catalog discovery. Auth + team-isolation gate everywhere; SQL classifier rejects writes (403). No SQL pass-through.

**Verify:** `cd packages/api && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/routers/query.test.ts && make dev-int FILE=query`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/api/src/routers/api/query.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/catalog.ts","packages/api/src/controllers/query.ts","packages/api/src/controllers/catalog.ts","packages/api/src/utils/queryClassifier.ts","packages/api/src/__tests__/routers/query.test.ts","packages/api/src/__tests__/routers/catalog.test.ts","packages/api/src/__tests__/utils/queryClassifier.test.ts","packages/api/src/routers/api/index.ts","packages/api/src/api-app.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/api && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/routers/query.test.ts && make dev-int FILE=query","acceptanceCriteria":["Auth-gated","Write SQL → 403","Team isolation","Cancel works","Sync/async fallback","Catalog routes proxy Glue","Tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-7-implement-query-lifecycle-api-endpoints"}
```

tasks.description:

**Goal:** New `/catalog` page with tree on the left, detail pane with breadcrumb / actions / 4 tabs (Schema / Sample / DDL / Stats) on the right.

**Verify:** `cd packages/app && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/components/Catalog/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/app/pages/catalog/index.tsx","packages/app/pages/catalog/[catalogId]/[database]/[table].tsx","packages/app/src/components/Catalog/CatalogTree.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Catalog/CatalogTableDetail.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Catalog/CatalogTabSchema.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Catalog/CatalogTabSample.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Catalog/CatalogTabDDL.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Catalog/CatalogTabStats.tsx","packages/app/src/hooks/useCatalogs.ts","packages/app/src/hooks/useDatabases.ts","packages/app/src/hooks/useTables.ts","packages/app/src/hooks/useTableSchema.ts","packages/app/src/__tests__/components/Catalog/CatalogTree.test.tsx","packages/app/src/components/AppNav/AppNav.tsx","packages/app/src/api.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/app && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/components/Catalog/","acceptanceCriteria":["Tree lazy loads","Filter works","Tabs render","Actions deep-link","AppNav link added","Tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-8-build-catalog-page"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Generalize Search/Discover for time-optional Sources
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 9)

**Goal:** `DBSearchPage` renders against the new single Table source. Time picker + histogram only when `timestampColumn` is set; flat row browser otherwise. Generic JSON side panel.

**Verify:** `cd packages/app && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/DBSearchPage.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/app/src/DBSearchPage.tsx","packages/app/src/DBSearchPageAlertModal.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBRowSidePanel.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBRowSidePanelHeader.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBSearchPageFilters.tsx","packages/app/src/ChartUtils.tsx","packages/app/src/timeQuery.ts","packages/app/src/api.ts","packages/app/src/searchFilters.tsx","packages/app/src/__tests__/DBSearchPage.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/app && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/DBSearchPage.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["Source picker generalized","Both modes","Trino on wire","Generic side panel","Cost shown","Tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-9-generalize-searchdiscover-for-time-optional-sources"}
```

**Goal:** New `/sources/list` page with per-row actions. Reusable `EditSourceModal` for both 'Save as Source' (Catalog) and 'Edit' (list). Time-column dropdown sourced from live schema.

**Verify:** `cd packages/app && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/components/Sources/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/app/pages/sources/list.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Sources/SourcesList.tsx","packages/app/src/components/Sources/EditSourceModal.tsx","packages/app/src/__tests__/components/Sources/SourcesList.test.tsx","packages/app/src/__tests__/components/Sources/EditSourceModal.test.tsx","packages/app/src/source.ts","packages/app/src/components/AppNav/AppNav.tsx","packages/api/src/routers/api/sources.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/app && yarn ci:unit src/__tests__/components/Sources/","acceptanceCriteria":["List renders + filters","Actions deep-link","Modal validates","Modal reused","AppNav link"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-10-build-sources-list-and-edit-source-modal"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Generalize Dashboard charts for any table
tasks.description:
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md (Task 11)

**Goal:** Dashboard UX preserved; under the hood, chart config retargets to single Table source kind, emits Trino SQL, hides time-axis chart types for Sources without timestampColumn. Tile-level alert UI removed.

**Verify:** `make ci-unit && yarn dev` (manual smoke)

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/app/src/DBDashboardPage.tsx","packages/app/src/DBChartPage.tsx","packages/app/src/components/ChartEditor","packages/app/src/components/DBEditTimeChartForm","packages/app/src/components/DBTimeChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBTableChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBNumberChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBPieChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBHeatmapChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBHistogramChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBListBarChart.tsx","packages/app/src/components/DBDeltaChart.tsx","packages/common-utils/src/core/renderChartConfig.ts","packages/common-utils/src/macros.ts","packages/app/src/components/DashboardContainer.tsx","packages/app/src/AlertScheduleFields.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"make ci-unit","acceptanceCriteria":["Source picker generalized","Trino SQL","Chart-type filtering","CRUD works","No alert UI","Tests pass"],"planRef":"docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-berg-implementation.md#task-11-generalize-dashboard-charts-for-any-table"}
```
